# load the quranic_verses.json and inspect some entries
import json, os, sys, unicodedata, re

qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
print("Exists q:", os.path.exists(qpath))
print("Exists h:", os.path.exists(hpath))
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
len_q = len(q)
print("len q:", len_q)
# show first 5 items keys and sample
for i in range(5):
    print(i, list(q[i].keys()))
    print(q[i].get('ayah_text', '')[:200])
# find entries containing the snippet without diacritics maybe search raw
snippet = "وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُمْ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍ مِّنَ"
# search raw substring
found = [item for item in q if snippet in item.get('ayah_text','')]
len(found), found[:1]

# define normalization functions and search
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile("""[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]""")
# common punctuation
punct = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A\u0660-\u0669]")  # but \w includes underscore and ascii...
# better remove punctuation by specific list maybe just remove tatweel and punctuation
tatweel = '\u0640'
def normalize(text):
    # remove tashkeel diacritics
    t = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', text)
    # remove tatweel
    t = t.replace(tatweel, '')
    # unify hamza: replace various hamza to bare ا
    t = t.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    t = t.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # remove punctuation symbols like Quranic small signs (۝) etc
    # remove punctuation marks: anything not Arabic letters or numbers or spaces
    t = re.sub(r"[^\u0621-\u064A0-9\s]", '', t)
    # collapse whitespace
    t = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', t).strip()
    # lowercase not necessary
    return t

q_texts = [item.get('ayah_text','') for item in q]
# build normalized texts mapping
norm_q = [normalize(txt) for txt in q_texts]

full_span = "وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُمْ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍ مِّنَ"
snippet = full_span
norm_full = normalize(full_span)
norm_full, snippet, len(norm_full)

# find candidates where norm_full is substring
candidates_idx = [i for i,nt in enumerate(norm_q) if norm_full in nt]
len(candidates_idx), candidates_idx[:10]

norm_cand = normalize(cand_text)
norm_full, norm_cand, cand_text
